se.liu.ida.hefquin.federation.wrappers.Wrapper

Description
se.liu.ida.hefquin.federation.members
 
se.liu.ida.hefquin.federation.wrappers
 

  • Uses of Wrapper in se.liu.ida.hefquin.federation.members

    Methods in se.liu.ida.hefquin.federation.members that return Wrapper
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Wrapper
    WrappedFederationMember.getWrapper()
    Returns the wrapper for this federation member.

  • Uses of Wrapper in se.liu.ida.hefquin.federation.wrappers

    Subinterfaces of Wrapper in se.liu.ida.hefquin.federation.wrappers
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    MaterializingWrapper
    This interface captures any type of wrapper that can be used to request data from the federation member that it wraps and, then, convert this data into RDF.
    interface 
    RewritingWrapper
    This interface captures any type of wrapper that can be used to evaluate SPARQL query patterns by means of query rewriting into a query language supported by the wrapped federation member.
